title: 宝塚記念の後に・かすめた指先

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Darn it... I was so close!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I worked hard, but I could've pushed more!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ha... it's funny.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Normally, I would just be sulking, saying "I knew
it" or something.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: But not now. I know I can use this experience to do better in the next race.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I... must've gotten stronger.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Impressive work, Nature.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: McQueen! Ryan!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I learned a lot from competing with you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, seeing you give it your all was something
else, Nature!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Let's run together again!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Definitely!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I'm looking forward to it!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Those two really know how to take things in
stride. They're already thinking about the future.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You can tell they don't dwell on their failures.
Instead, they're already racing towards their next
victory.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Teio was the same way. That's why she's so strong.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Up until now, I always limited myself, believing I
couldn't do more, no matter how hard I tried.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I thought the same thing about third place. I had
given up, thinking that I couldn't go any further...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But that was wrong. If I want to shine bright, I
need to change my mindset.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I need to aim for first. That way, even if I finish in
third... I'm still moving forward.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Doubt no longer clouds Nice Nature's vision. Even
in a larger race, she'll continue to challenge
herself and others, undaunted.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Only one race can give her even more confidence
and prestige...
choice_data_list: Do you wanna try the autumn Tenno Sho next?
Do you wanna try the autumn Tenno Sho next?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: The autumn Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Me? In the Tenno Sho? With its long history and
heritage?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...No, what am I getting shaky again for?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I can't worry whether or not I deserve to be in the
race. I have to believe that I'm worthy and cheer
myself on!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Let's take that grand autumn stage by storm!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we decide that she will compete in the
autumn Tenno Sho, the race that determines the
best medium-distance runner!
